moments.author: Gradey Dick
moments.quote: TORONTO! It was a blessing and I am forever grateful to have been a Raptor. I genuinely appreciate all the love and support over the years. Memories in the 6ix that’ll last a lifetime!!
moments.why: Marks a heartfelt farewell after being traded from the Raptors to the Clippers—strong emotional resonance for NBA fans.

moments.author: Jayson Tatum
moments.quote: Grateful for all that we accomplished together, for pushing me to be a better player… Nothing but love & respect for you as a player & as a person… wish nothing but the best for you.
moments.why: A public farewell to Jaylen Brown, reflecting team chemistry and signaling roster changes likely to spark NBA discussion.

moments.author: Lime (Neutron Holdings)
moments.quote: Lime’s IPO sees demand six times available shares.
moments.why: The IPO drew extraordinary investor demand—six times the shares—highlighting strong sentiment in mobility/micro‑transportation markets.
